title: 咖啡店点单不翻车！5句救命英语☕

cover.style_keywords: 暖调插画风、手绘咖啡杯、小红书质感、清爽留白、中英双语标签

slides.correct_en: Is there a table for one/two?
slides.correct_cn: 有一人/两人位吗？（自然又礼貌）

dialogue.a: A: Hi, is there a table for two?
dialogue.b: B: Yes! Right by the window — I’ll grab you some napkins!
dialogue.b_cn: B：有！靠窗那边～我马上拿纸巾！

slides.tip: 别用empty seat（像在检查仓库😅），用table for X更地道；‘for one/two’比‘available’更日常！

slides.correct_en: Could I get that with light ice and oat milk instead?
slides.correct_cn: 这杯能少放点冰、换成燕麦奶吗？

dialogue.a: A: Could I get that with light ice and oat milk instead?
dialogue.a_cn: A：这杯能少放点冰、换成燕麦奶吗？
dialogue.b: B: Absolutely — and I’ll double the espresso since oat milk’s milder!
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以～燕麦奶味淡，我给你加双份浓缩哦！

slides.tip: No ice = 命令感+歧义（可能被听成‘不要冰块’但语气像拒绝对方）；light ice / half ice / easy ice 才是母语者真·点单黑话！

slides.correct_en: Same here, please — and could I add a matcha croissant?
slides.correct_cn: 我要跟刚才那杯一样，再加个抹茶牛角包！

dialogue.a: A: Same here, please — and could I add a matcha croissant?
dialogue.a_cn: A：我要跟刚才那杯一样，再加个抹茶牛角包！
dialogue.b: B: Got it — latte + croissant, coming right up!
dialogue.b_cn: B：明白啦～拿铁加牛角包，马上来！

slides.tip: Same here 比 ‘me too’ 更清晰（避免指代混乱），加please和and… makes it flow like real talk 🌟

slides.wrong_cn: This is too bitter. Make it less bitter.
slides.wrong_en: This is too bitter. Make it less bitter.
slides.correct_en: Would it be possible to make this a bit milder? Maybe with an extra splash of oat milk?
slides.correct_cn: 能让它口感柔和一点吗？加一小勺燕麦奶可以吗？

dialogue.a: A: Would it be possible to make this a bit milder? Maybe with an extra splash of oat milk?
dialogue.a_cn: A：能让它口感柔和一点吗？加一小勺燕麦奶可以吗？
dialogue.b: B: Totally — let me steam some extra milk and remix it for you!
dialogue.b_cn: B：完全没问题～我马上打点奶重新调一杯！

slides.tip: 直接说too bitter像在挑刺😭；用would it be possible… + gentle suggestion（maybe…）瞬间变友好VIP顾客！

slides.wrong_en: How much change do I get?
slides.correct_en: Will that be all? And just checking — I paid with ¥100, so $X back?
slides.correct_cn: 就这些对吗？我付了100元，应该找回X元对吧？

dialogue.a: A: Will that be all? And just checking — I paid with ¥100, so $12.50 back?
dialogue.a_cn: A：就这些对吗？我付了100元，应该找回12.5元对吧？
dialogue.b: B: Yep — here’s your $12.50 and loyalty stamp! ☕
dialogue.b_cn: B：没错～这是您的12.5元，还有会员章一枚！☕

slides.tip: How much change… 听起来像查账；用‘just checking’软化语气+主动提供付款信息，店员超爱配合！

caption:
90%的人点咖啡只说‘I want a latte’——结果端上来才发现不是自己想要的那杯。😅其实店员不是听不懂，是你的表达太‘翻译腔’了！今天这5句，全是我在上海/东京/纽约咖啡馆蹲点记下的真实对话✨不背语法、不抠发音，说了就有人懂！下次点单前，记得打开这篇存好～你最常踩雷的是哪一句？评论区交出你的翻车现场👇（悄悄说：第4句救过我的命…）
